description: Conjur is CyberArk's secrets management and machine identity system for applications and infrastructure. It stores and controls access to secrets and related policy in self-hosted Conjur deployments.
summary: conjur.org exposes a self-hosted Conjur REST API and a Conjur CLI; both use Conjur-issued credentials (password, API key, and short-lived access token), with no evidence of GraphQL or MCP surfaces.

packages.identifier: CyberArk Secrets Manager CLI / Conjur CLI installers
packages.runtimeHint: See CLI setup docs for platform-specific install methods
